Metro Council WA

Delivering local government services to 85,000 residents across 12 suburbs in inner and middle Perth.

Metro Council WA acknowledges the Whadjuk people of the Noongar nation as the Traditional Custodians of the lands on which we work, and we pay our respects to Elders past and present.
